summary: Completed frontend testing of Driver Dashboard dark/light theme system and notification tone settings. All requested features verified working: (1) Driver login, (2) Dashboard dark theme, (3) Available orders tab, (4) My orders tab, (5) Earnings tab, (6) Settings page dark theme, (7) Notification tones settings with 6 tone options, (8) Loyalty card dark theme, (9) Driver info tab, (10) Theme toggle button (auto/light/dark modes).

minor.issue: 401 Unauthorized errors when auth token expires during session - Error fetching wallet, ratings, availability, challenges

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Dark theme implemented correctly with CSS variables (--driver-bg-primary: #0f0f0f, --driver-bg-card: #1a1a1a)
✅ Theme toggle cycles through 3 modes: auto (time-based), light, dark
✅ NotificationToneSettings component shows 6 tones for 3 order types with preview and selection
✅ driver-dark-theme.css properly styles all driver dashboard components
✅ Theme preference persists in localStorage as 'driverThemeMode'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Driver dashboard dark theme fully functional. Theme toggle button in header cycles through auto/light/dark modes. Settings page has 5 tabs for driver (معلوماتي, النغمات, نقاط الولاء, العناوين, طرق الدفع). Notification tones tab shows 6 tone options (عاجلة, كلاسيكية, مرحة, رقمية, ناعمة, جرس) for 3 order types (food, products, priority). Each tone has preview button and selection indicator.

2_dashboard_dark_theme.details: Dark background (#0f0f0f), cards (#1a1a1a), proper text contrast

3_available_orders_tab.details: Tab visible, filters (الكل, منتجات, طعام) working, order cards styled

4_my_orders_tab.details: Tab visible with count, empty state properly styled with dark theme

5_earnings_tab.details: إحصائيات الأرباح header, sub-tabs (نظرة عامة, الرسم البياني, السجل) visible

6_settings_page_dark_theme.details: Dark styling applied, all tabs visible, dark mode toggle present

7_notification_tones_tab.details: 3 sections (طلبات الطعام, طلبات المنتجات, طلبات الأولوية), 6 tones each (عاجلة, كلاسيكية, مرحة, رقمية, ناعمة, جرس), preview buttons work

8_loyalty_card_dark_theme.details: Bronze tier card with gradient, points display, redeem section, dark themed

9_driver_info_tab.details: Wallet balance, rating, leaderboard, behavior points, achievements, performance stats, delivery box all visible

10_theme_toggle_button.details: Button shows current mode (🔄 auto, ☀️ light, 🌙 dark), cycles correctly, persists to localStorage

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/07_driver_dashboard.png - Dashboard with dark theme and notification modal
.screenshots/11_settings_page.png - Settings page loyalty tab with dark theme
.screenshots/12_notification_tones.png - Notification tones settings showing 6 tones per order type
.screenshots/14_driver_info.png - Driver info tab with all sections
